sections.title: Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Woo wooo?

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Who indeed? I am a wise Knight of the Owl. I serve the Justiciar of the Owl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's this Justiciar of the Owl?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Saradomin's wisest of servants. It surprises me that you've not heard of his many feats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know any?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: I know them all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Care to share?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Of course. Do you see the foliage around you, adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: For it to be in such a state means that there is unimaginable evil nearby. These plants were grown personally by Zachariah, the Justiciar of the Owl.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Anything he plants blossoms with unimaginable vigour. You may have noticed that he has a love for lilies. Perhaps he knew they'd serve multiple purposes in a place like this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm. Hopefully I'll meet him one day.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: If you do, send my regards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a name?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: I'm but a loyal watcher, that is all.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: So, was there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your helmet looks familiar. I defeated a knight who wore one with a similar design.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: This helmet? It is based on the one worn by the Justiciar of the Owl. You mean to say you fought the great Zachariah and lived to tell the tale?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I suppose so.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: This can't be... You killed the great Zachariah?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, he didn't really die. He just sort of faded away and left behind a glowing magical hand.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Strange, when I saw him last he had no magical hand to speak of... I suppose time has changed the world above beyond my recollection...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, it probably has.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's with the owls?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: They are a symbol of the wise. You see, owls can see the light in the darkest of places. Their presence within the sepulchre is one of grave importance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I saw some down there. They seemed incorporeal in some way, as if they were ghosts...

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Indeed. These creatures have the blessing of Saradomin and the wisdom of ages long past. They are the watchers of the Hallowed Sepulchre. The last defence against unseen evils.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... past the wolves?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: The third floor... Home.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Thank you for freeing me, adventurer. If the owls have already retreated that far back, it's best that I reside here. From this position I can more effectively watch for evil.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Perhaps I should steal from graves more often?

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, nothing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm off now, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Stay watchful.

sections.title: Upon opening a coffin in the Hallowed Sepulchre
Without an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: Woo? Woo wooooooooo!

sections.title: With an Amulet of ghostspeak or Morytania legs 2 or higher equipped

lines.speaker: Knight of the Owl
lines.text: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
